sqlMap.select: select * from PlantiffSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into PlantiffSuppLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey NumberOfAttorneyInPlantiffWork PercentOfAttorneyTimeDevToPlantiff NumberOfSuppotedStaffToPlantiff NumberOfInjuryCasesIn12Month NumberOfInjuryHandleByAttorney IsApplAdvertiseByTelevision IsApplAdvertiseByRadio IsApplAdvertiseByNewspaper IsApplAdvertiseByYellowpages IsRefAggrementReferToAppl IsRefAggrementReferToApplRefersOut IsAppAcceptRefersFromOtherFirms IsSettlementAggrementsUsed IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLim PerOfCasesBeforeTrail PerOfCasesTriedToConclusion PerOfCasesReferToApplicant LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp IsAppConfirmCarryProfLiabIns IsApplAdvertiseByInternet IsApplAdvertiseByMagazine PerOfCasesSettledBeforeTrail IsAppReferToOtherLawFirms IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLimDesc massTortOrClassAction ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #NumberOfAttorneyInPlantiffWork# #PercentOfAttorneyTimeDevToPlantiff# #NumberOfSuppotedStaffToPlantiff# #NumberOfInjuryCasesIn12Month# #NumberOfInjuryHandleByAttorney# #IsApplAdvertiseByTelevision# #IsApplAdvertiseByRadio# #IsApplAdvertiseByNewspaper# #IsApplAdvertiseByYellowpages# #IsRefAggrementReferToAppl# #IsRefAggrementReferToApplRefersOut# #IsAppAcceptRefersFromOtherFirms# #IsSettlementAggrementsUsed# #IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLim# #PerOfCasesBeforeTrail# #PerOfCasesTriedToConclusion# #PerOfCasesReferToApplicant# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #IsAppConfirmCarryProfLiabIns# #IsApplAdvertiseByInternet# #IsApplAdvertiseByMagazine# #PerOfCasesSettledBeforeTrail# #IsAppReferToOtherLawFirms# #IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLimDesc# #massTortOrClassAction# )
sqlMap.select: select NumberOfAttorneyInPlantiffWork, PercentOfAttorneyTimeDevToPlantiff, NumberOfSuppotedStaffToPlantiff, NumberOfInjuryCasesIn12Month, NumberOfInjuryHandleByAttorney, IsApplAdvertiseByTelevision, IsApplAdvertiseByRadio, IsApplAdvertiseByNewspaper, IsApplAdvertiseByYellowpages, IsRefAggrementReferToAppl, IsRefAggrementReferToApplRefersOut, IsAppAcceptRefersFromOtherFirms, IsSettlementAggrementsUsed, IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLim, PerOfCasesBeforeTrail, PerOfCasesTriedToConclusion, PerOfCasesReferToApplicant, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsAppConfirmCarryProfLiabIns, IsApplAdvertiseByInternet, IsApplAdvertiseByMagazine, PerOfCasesSettledBeforeTrail, IsAppReferToOtherLawFirms, IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLimDesc, massTortOrClassAction, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from PlantiffSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update PlantiffSuppLW set
NumberOfAttorneyInPlantiffWork = #NumberOfAttorneyInPlantiffWork# NumberOfAttorneyInPlantiffWork = null PercentOfAttorneyTimeDevToPlantiff = #PercentOfAttorneyTimeDevToPlantiff# PercentOfAttorneyTimeDevToPlantiff = null NumberOfSuppotedStaffToPlantiff = #NumberOfSuppotedStaffToPlantiff# NumberOfSuppotedStaffToPlantiff = null NumberOfInjuryCasesIn12Month = #NumberOfInjuryCasesIn12Month# NumberOfInjuryCasesIn12Month = null NumberOfInjuryHandleByAttorney = #NumberOfInjuryHandleByAttorney# NumberOfInjuryHandleByAttorney = null IsApplAdvertiseByTelevision = #IsApplAdvertiseByTelevision# IsApplAdvertiseByTelevision = null IsApplAdvertiseByRadio = #IsApplAdvertiseByRadio# IsApplAdvertiseByRadio = null IsApplAdvertiseByNewspaper = #IsApplAdvertiseByNewspaper# IsApplAdvertiseByNewspaper = null IsApplAdvertiseByYellowpages = #IsApplAdvertiseByYellowpages# IsApplAdvertiseByYellowpages = null IsRefAggrementReferToAppl = #IsRefAggrementReferToAppl# IsRefAggrementReferToAppl = null IsRefAggrementReferToApplRefersOut = #IsRefAggrementReferToApplRefersOut# IsRefAggrementReferToApplRefersOut = null IsAppAcceptRefersFromOtherFirms = #IsAppAcceptRefersFromOtherFirms# IsAppAcceptRefersFromOtherFirms = null IsSettlementAggrementsUsed = #IsSettlementAggrementsUsed# IsSettlementAggrementsUsed = null IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLim = #IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLim# IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLim = null PerOfCasesBeforeTrail = #PerOfCasesBeforeTrail# PerOfCasesBeforeTrail = null PerOfCasesTriedToConclusion = #PerOfCasesTriedToConclusion# PerOfCasesTriedToConclusion = null PerOfCasesReferToApplicant = #PerOfCasesReferToApplicant# PerOfCasesReferToApplicant = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null IsAppConfirmCarryProfLiabIns = #IsAppConfirmCarryProfLiabIns# IsAppConfirmCarryProfLiabIns = null IsApplAdvertiseByInternet = #IsApplAdvertiseByInternet# IsApplAdvertiseByInternet = null IsApplAdvertiseByMagazine = #IsApplAdvertiseByMagazine# IsApplAdvertiseByMagazine = null PerOfCasesSettledBeforeTrail = #PerOfCasesSettledBeforeTrail# PerOfCasesSettledBeforeTrail = null IsAppReferToOtherLawFirms = #IsAppReferToOtherLawFirms# IsAppReferToOtherLawFirms = null IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLimDesc = #IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLimDesc# IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLimDesc = null massTortOrClassAction = #massTortOrClassAction# massTortOrClassAction = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from PlantiffSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from PlantiffSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select NumberOfAttorneyInPlantiffWork, PercentOfAttorneyTimeDevToPlantiff, NumberOfSuppotedStaffToPlantiff, NumberOfInjuryCasesIn12Month, NumberOfInjuryHandleByAttorney, IsApplAdvertiseByTelevision, IsApplAdvertiseByRadio, IsApplAdvertiseByNewspaper, IsApplAdvertiseByYellowpages, IsRefAggrementReferToAppl, IsRefAggrementReferToApplRefersOut, IsAppAcceptRefersFromOtherFirms, IsSettlementAggrementsUsed, IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLim, PerOfCasesBeforeTrail, PerOfCasesTriedToConclusion, PerOfCasesReferToApplicant, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsAppConfirmCarryProfLiabIns, IsApplAdvertiseByInternet, IsApplAdvertiseByMagazine, PerOfCasesSettledBeforeTrail, IsAppReferToOtherLawFirms, IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLimDesc, massTortOrClassAction, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from PlantiffSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, NumberOfAttorneyInPlantiffWork, PercentOfAttorneyTimeDevToPlantiff, NumberOfSuppotedStaffToPlantiff, NumberOfInjuryCasesIn12Month, NumberOfInjuryHandleByAttorney, IsApplAdvertiseByTelevision, IsApplAdvertiseByRadio, IsApplAdvertiseByNewspaper, IsApplAdvertiseByYellowpages, IsRefAggrementReferToAppl, IsRefAggrementReferToApplRefersOut, IsAppAcceptRefersFromOtherFirms, IsSettlementAggrementsUsed, IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLim, PerOfCasesBeforeTrail, PerOfCasesTriedToConclusion, PerOfCasesReferToApplicant, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsAppConfirmCarryProfLiabIns, IsApplAdvertiseByInternet, IsApplAdvertiseByMagazine, PerOfCasesSettledBeforeTrail, IsAppReferToOtherLawFirms, IsApplAcceptCasesToStatuteOfLimDesc, massTortOrClassAction from PlantiffSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
